description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the quay.io/jangorecki/r-pkg Docker image and defines a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch. The pages job should execute the shell commands: R CMD build ., R CMD check $(ls -1t *.tar.gz | head -n 1) --no-manual --as-cran, mkdir public Rcheck, Rscript -e 'drat::insertArtifacts(repodir = "public", repo.url = "https://jangorecki.github.io/r.pkg.gitlab.ci")', and mv $(find . -maxdepth 1 -name "*.Rcheck" -type d) Rcheck. It must publish the Rcheck and public directories as artifacts for GitLab Pages.
